modules.title: Introduction to C++
topics: History of C++ and evolution from C
Setting up the development environment (g++, Clang, IDE)
C++ program structure and compilation pipeline
Key differences between C and C++
handsOn: Install g++ and compile first C++ program
Write programs using std::cout and std::cin
modules.learningOutcome: Understand the C++ ecosystem, its evolution from C, and set up a productive development environment.

modules.title: Data Types, Variables & Operators
topics: Primitive data types and the C++ type system
handsOn: Programs using references, auto keyword, and range-based for loops
Type casting demonstrations and comparison
modules.learningOutcome: Use C++'s type system effectively including modern features like auto, references, and range-based loops.

modules.title: Control Flow & Functions
topics: Loops: for, while, do-while, range-based for
Function overloading: same name, different signatures
handsOn: Function overloading examples with different parameter types
Lambda expressions for simple operations
modules.learningOutcome: Write clean control flow and leverage C++ function features including overloading and lambdas.

modules.title: OOP: Classes & Objects
topics: Class definition, member variables, and object creation
handsOn: Build a BankAccount class with full constructor/destructor lifecycle
Implement static member to track object instances
modules.learningOutcome: Design and implement robust C++ classes using constructors, destructors, and the this pointer.

modules.title: Inheritance & Polymorphism
topics: Access control in inheritance: public, protected, private
Virtual functions and the vtable mechanism
Pure virtual functions and abstract classes (interface-like design)
handsOn: Implement a Shape hierarchy: Circle, Rectangle, Triangle with area()
Demonstrate runtime polymorphism with base class pointers
modules.learningOutcome: Apply inheritance and polymorphism to build extensible and reusable C++ class hierarchies.

modules.title: Encapsulation, Abstraction & Friends
topics: Encapsulation through getter and setter methods
modules.learningOutcome: Enforce data protection and design clean interfaces using encapsulation, abstraction, and friend access.

modules.title: Operator Overloading
handsOn: Overload +, -, and << operators for a Complex Number class
Implement a String class with overloaded operators
modules.learningOutcome: Extend C++ operators to work naturally with user-defined types using operator overloading.

modules.title: Pointers, References & Memory Management
topics: Raw pointers vs references in C++
Dynamic memory allocation with new and delete
handsOn: Replace raw pointers with smart pointers in a linked list
Demonstrate ownership transfer with std::move
modules.learningOutcome: Manage memory safely and efficiently using smart pointers, RAII, and move semantics in modern C++.

modules.title: Templates & Generic Programming
topics: Template parameters, type deduction, and instantiation
handsOn: Generic Stack class using class templates
Generic sorting template function
modules.learningOutcome: Write type-independent, reusable components using C++ templates and generic programming.

modules.title: STL Containers & Iterators
handsOn: Word frequency counter using std::unordered_map
Sorted data management with std::set and std::map
modules.learningOutcome: Select and use appropriate STL containers and iterators for efficient data storage and access.

modules.title: STL Algorithms & Functional Programming
handsOn: Data processing pipeline using STL algorithms and lambdas
Custom comparators and predicates with std::sort
modules.learningOutcome: Apply STL algorithms to process data efficiently using modern, functional C++ programming patterns.

modules.title: Exception Handling
topics: Exception handling basics: try, catch, throw
Exception-safe programming and RAII for exception safety
handsOn: Implement exception-safe file parser with custom exceptions
modules.learningOutcome: Write robust C++ programs that handle errors gracefully using the exception mechanism.

modules.title: File I/O & Streams
handsOn: Read and process a CSV file with structured data
Write formatted student reports to file
modules.learningOutcome: Perform flexible and formatted I/O operations using C++ stream classes.

modules.title: Modern C++ Features (C++11 to C++20)
handsOn: Refactor a legacy C++ project to use modern features
modules.learningOutcome: Leverage modern C++ standards to write safer, more expressive, and performant code.

modules.title: Design Patterns in C++
topics: Singleton, Factory Method, Abstract Factory, Builder
SOLID principles applied to C++ design
handsOn: Implement Observer and Strategy patterns in a simulation
modules.learningOutcome: Apply classic design patterns to solve common software engineering problems in C++.

modules.title: Concurrency & Multithreading
topics: std::future and std::promise for async results
handsOn: Thread pool implementation with std::async and futures
modules.learningOutcome: Write safe and efficient concurrent C++ programs using the standard library threading primitives.

modules.title: Performance Optimization
topics: Cache-friendly data structures and memory layout
Profiling with gprof, perf, and Valgrind callgrind
Copy elision and Return Value Optimization (RVO/NRVO)
handsOn: Profile and optimize a matrix multiplication implementation
modules.learningOutcome: Identify and eliminate performance bottlenecks in C++ programs using profiling and optimization techniques.

modules.title: Advanced Templates & Metaprogramming
topics: SFINAE (Substitution Failure Is Not An Error)
modules.learningOutcome: Write compile-time generic code using SFINAE, type traits, and metaprogramming techniques.

modules.title: Build Systems & Package Management
topics: Advanced CMake: targets, properties, install, export
vcpkg package manager for C++ dependencies
Static and dynamic libraries in CMake
handsOn: Build a multi-library C++ project using CMake and vcpkg
modules.learningOutcome: Manage C++ projects and their dependencies using modern build systems and package managers.

modules.title: Testing & Code Quality
topics: Unit testing with Google Test: TEST, EXPECT_EQ, ASSERT_EQ
handsOn: Write unit tests for a data structure library using gtest
modules.learningOutcome: Ensure C++ code quality and correctness using unit testing, mocking, and sanitizer tools.
